title: Water Is the First Principle
description: The earliest recorded philosophical proposition in Western history: all things are water.
introduction: The earliest recorded philosophical proposition in Western history: all things are water.

translation.original_text: Θαλῆς μὲν ὁ τῆς τοιαύτης ἀρχηγὸς φιλοσοφίας ὕδωρ φησὶν εἶναι.
translation.text: Thales, the founder of this type of philosophy, says that it is water.
